name: algebraic-filter
description: Algebraic-law-level machine verification guardrail for AI-generated Python code. An additive +α PostToolUse hook: detects algebraic-law violations (Monoid/Functor/Monad/etc.) + data-movement defects that lint/type-checkers miss, and feeds structured feedback back to Claude for self-correction. Composes on top of any base quality tooling (ruff/pyright/etc.).
